THE CROWD99 99
Cheers. They turn their attention to the remaining prisoners
CAMERA PANS from their bloodthirsty
faces to the next prisone r
in line...
ASH100 100
turns to Arthur and in a desperate, cowardly plea:
ASH
Hey, I never even saw these
assholes before..
He spins to Duke Henry the Red. You gotta tell 'em you don't
know me. We never met. Tell him.
HENRY
I do not believe that he shall
listen.
THE WARRIORS101 101
grab Ash and shove him into the pit.
ASH102 102
tumbles down into the pit. He lands in a STEAMING pool of fo
ul water at the pit's bottom. He stands and coughs out a
mouthf ul
of the rancid water. He looks about.
INT. PIT - ASH'S P.O.V.103 103
UNDERGROUND CAVERNS disappear into the blackness.

DOGS169 169
around the fire begin to snarl and fight.
ASH AND SHEILA170 170
turn to see...
THE OLD WOMAN171 171
now standing too close to the fire. Her robes ignites. She
does not respond as flames sweep up her body. She continues
to sti r the caldron.
ASH172 172
His haw drops. He slowly stands as...
THE BURNING WOMAN173 173
spins sharply to him. Her voice changes as she SHRIEKS;
POSSESSED WOMAN YOU SHALL DIE! Her eyes are bone white. She
is POSSESSED by the dark spirit . Her burning body is
violently jerked about in the air by invisible hands. Her
blackened lips pull back in a wild anima l snarl. With two
voice at once; POSSESSED WOMAN YOU SHALL NEVER WIN THE
NECRONOMICON. WE SHALL FEAST UPON YOUR SOUL, AND THEN THE
SOUL OF MAN!
THE POSSESSED WOMAN174 174
collapses. Her face turned away from the Wisemen as it lays i
n the dust.

THE IRON HAND321 321
connects with an uppercut that knocks Ash out of frame.
ASH322 322
lands next to an iron vice. He reaches for the EVIL HAND. Bu
t the hand has grabbed a mallet that BONK-BONKS him on the
head . Ash is groggy as he is grabbed by the hair and yanked
down in to the opened vice.
THE EVIL IRON HAND323 323
cranks the vice's handle.
THE VICE324 324
tightens around Ash's head. Trapped, he looks to...
THE EVIL HAND325 325
rummaging through a wooden toolbox. It comes upon a crude wo
oden punch.
ANGLE - THE EVIL HAND - UNDERCRANKED326 326
stabs rapidly at Ash's good hand. But Ash expertly dodges ea
ch stab with an opening of the fingers or a closing of the
thumb is super fast motion.
ASH327 327
with is head still wedged in the vice.
ASH
Why you dirty little...AHHHHHH!!
A PAIR OF IRON PLIERS328 328
has entered frame and clamps down upon Ash's nose. He emits
a nasal SCREAM and shakes the pliers loose.

ASH368 368
moves toward the cemetery.
ASH'S P.O.V. - THE CEMETERY369 369
In the center, lies a massive slab of black stone.
ASH370 370
draws closer, his teeth chattering as the wind blasts at him.
He glances down to...
ASH'S P.O.V. - TRACKING SHOT - SKULL371 371
sitting atop the ground, leering up at CAMERA with empty eye
sockets. The wind whistles through the empty skull. The jaw
bone drops open with a squeak.
CLOSE ON ASH372 372
His hair is whipped up by the wind. He looks to...
THE MASSIVE BLACK STONE IN THE CEMETERY'S CENTER373 373
backlit by the rising moon, creates eerie beams of light and
shadow.
ASH374 374
arrives at the foot of the massive stone.
UNDERCRANKED - THE STONE375 375
Atop it sits... THE BOOK OF THE DEAD.
CAMERA PANS REVEALING...376 376
A SECOND BOOK OF THE DEAD!
CAMERA PANS AGAIN REVEALING...377 377
A THIRD!

ASH
No.. They're right. I screwed up.
I didn't come through for you,
and... I'm sorry for it.
SHEILA
I still have faith in thee. In my
heart I know thou wilt still
succeed.
ASH
Sheila... It's over for me. I don't
belong here and I'm going home. I
didn't have what it took. It's
over.
He bows his head and moves off. A high pitched SHRIEK is
heard!
ALL HEADS445 445
look to the sky.
TWO WINGED DEADITES446 446
possessed women with bat-like wings, swoop down.
TEN VILLAGERS447 447
scream as they flee from the winged beasts.
WINGED DEADITE #1448 448
Like a delta winged F-15, it banks towards Sheila.

ASH
takes charcoal from a dead fire and
chips of dried cow dung. He mixes
them with sulfur.
THE BLACK POWDER491 491
is bound up in a small satchel and affixed to an arrow.
GOLD TOOTH492 492
lights the fuse with a torch.
ASH493 493
draws back and releases the arrow. ZING!
THE ARROW494 494
imbeds in a wooden post and EXPLODES. Large pieces of wood ar
e sent flying.
ARTHUR'S WARRIORS495 495
watch in awe.
EXT. CASTLE LOOKOUT TOWER - DUSK496 496
THE CASTLE BELL is rung madly. The signal for battle
stations.
A WARRIOR497 497
rides in through the castle gates screaming:
CONTINUED:489 489
WARRIOR
They're coming! The Deadites
approach!

Protect the book or God save us
all!
THE WARRIORS553 553
retreat across the courtyard to rope ladders that scale the
parapet.
ARTHUR'S MEN CLIMB ATOP THE PARAPET554 554
The rope ladders are hastily pulled up, leaving no access.
INT. COURTYARD - SIX OF ARTHUR'S WARRIORS555 555
are stranded in the courtyard. They fight for their lives but
are quickly overcome.
EVIL SHEILA556 556
takes out the last of the stranded warriors with her sword.
EVIL ASH557 557
smiles at Sheila. He turns his attention to the guarded tower
just beyond the parapet.
EVIL ASH
The book shall be mine! He raises
his rusty sword.
LADDERS!
TWELVE EVIL DEAD558 558
storm the parapet with three crudely built wooden ladders as
large rocks rain down upon them from above.
TWO WARRIORS559 559
push away ladder #1.

SKELETON ASH (CONT’D)
LONG SHOT - THE BATTLEFIELD - MORNING618 618
Smoking skeletons lay scattered. Henry and Arthur's Warriors
work together. They toss the deadite bones and armor into a
bonfire.
CLOSE SHOT - TWO DEADITE SKULLS619 619
engulfed by flames, crack in the heat.
DISSOLVE TO:
EXT. SEASHORE - ARROWHEADS - DUSK620 620
are dipped into the flame of a bonfire. They ignite.
THE INTEGRATED ARMY OF HENRY AND ARTHUR'S MEN621 621
Form a row of archers. They fire their flaming arrows toward
the sea.
THE ARROWS622 622
strike a wooden ship that holds the body of Arthur.
ASH (V.O.)
We said goodbye to Arthur. Sure we
had our problems. But in the end,
he was all right.
DISSOLVE TO:
EXT. SEASHORE - DUSK623 623
ASH AND THE OTHERS watch the funeral pyre sail off. It's
flickering flames play upon their faces.
